items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of the requirement for 'Multi-touch attribution compatibility', but there is no concrete evidence provided that confirms this requirement is met. The linked use case mentions the need for multi-touch attribution compatibility, yet the prior step evidence does not include any data or endpoints that specifically address this aspect, leading to an inconclusive status.
